hooks.command: modified_file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$modified_file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then npx prettier --write "$modified_file" 2>/dev/null; fi
osascript -e 'display notification "Task completed" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Ping"'
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Glass"'
